data.name: Hentai Clicker: Hanma is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Hanma is Streaming

Step into a world of allure and excitement, where Hanma, the charming idol, responds to your every click. Collect hearts, unlock new outfits, and immerse yourself in an interactive experience full of surprises!

🍑 About the Game

Dive into an enchanting universe where every click brings you closer to Hanma’s playful secrets. Collect hearts to progress through captivating stages while unlocking exciting outfits and rewards. Upgrade your skills to gather hearts faster and reach your goals.

🎉 Features

  • 🎨 Stunning Anime Graphics – Enjoy breathtaking anime-style visuals that bring Hanma to life.

  • 🎯 Motivating Goals – Unlock new stages and outfits, from classic idol looks to the boldest designs.

  • 🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Simple and fun mechanics that will keep you clicking nonstop.

  • 💪 Skill Upgrades – Boost your heart collection speed, from "Basic" to "Eternal" levels.

  • 👗 Diverse Wardrobe – Unlock a variety of outfits.

  • 🔥 Interactive Experience – Enjoy voice acting and dialogues that evolve as you progress.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

Hentai Clicker: Hanma is Streaming offers more than just a game – it’s an immersive experience. Whether it’s the stunning graphics, satisfying clicker gameplay, or Nina’s captivating personality, there’s something for everyone to enjoy!

🎮 How to Play

  • 🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – The more you click, the more hearts you earn!

  • 🔓 Unlock New Stages – Use your hearts to reveal Hanma’s outfits and secret scenes.

  • 🚀 Upgrade Your Skills – Invest in enhancements to speed up your heart collection and progress faster.

🎉 Join the Adventure!

Ready to start? Jump into Hentai Clicker: Hanma is Streaming now and uncover all the secrets waiting to be revealed!

data.short_description: 🔞Step into a world of playful discovery with Hentai Clicker: Nina is Streaming!❤️ Collect hearts, unlock daring outfits, and upgrade abilities in this addictive clicker game. Enjoy stunning anime visuals, explicit content, and interactive voice acting for a truly immersive experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 德文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
